title: Upstart Shares Tumble as Q2 Earnings Miss Overshadows Revenue Beat
text: Upstart Holdings stock tumbled despite achieving its first GAAP profitable quarter in Q2 2025 due to earnings miss overshadowing revenue beat. The company reported GAAP net income of $5.6 million, a substantial improvement from a loss of $54.5 million in Q2 2024, representing a dramatic profitability turnaround. However, the earnings per share missed consensus expectations. Adjusted EBITDA reached $53.1 million with a 21% margin. The company provided optimistic outlook forecasting Q3 2025 revenue above consensus and full fiscal year 2025 revenue surpassing analyst projections. Despite strong revenue growth at 102% year-over-year, the market reacted cautiously to the earnings results, demonstrating the importance of profitability metrics alongside revenue growth.
